privileged_info_summary: The task is generative and synthetic, explicitly requiring the agent to navigate to Rocket.Chat Settings > Accounts and configure four specific fields: Registration Form ('Public'), Allowed Domains List ('rocketchat.local'), Allow User Profile Change (false), and Allow Name Change (false). All expected values perfectly match the task instructions, setup_task.sh initializations, and the evaluation criteria in verifier.py.
